name: Cuck Your Classmate
description:
The girl you liked got snatched by Timmy, a classmate who hates you for no clear reason, and he didn’t stop there he rubbed it in your face, bullied, and teased you relentlessly. If that wasn’t enough, his annoying mom showed up at your apartment, making a scene.

Path 1: Fuck Timmy. FUCK HIS DAMN MOTHER AND RUB IT ON HIS FACE.

Path 2: Explain yourself she thinks you’re the one bullying her precious son.

CN: This involves cucking, cuckold what did you expect? Oh, and it’s also made very poorly; even ChatGPT would make a better bot than this. I just made it so I can goon to this today. Image is by @Yonda545 on x.com.

Its not rape if i like it
creator: selfish
